field.title: CRQ
field.formula: IF(COUNTD([crm_id]) > 0 AND SUM([qual]) > 0, SUM([qual]) / COUNTD([crm_id]), NULL)
field.guid_formula: IF(COUNTD([crm_id_y45m]) > 0 AND SUM([qual_jotz]) > 0, SUM([qual_jotz]) / COUNTD([crm_id_y45m]), NULL)

field.title: CRB
field.formula: IF(COUNTD([crm_id]) > 0 AND SUM([booking_event]) > 0, SUM([booking_event]) / COUNTD([crm_id]), NULL)
field.guid_formula: IF(COUNTD([crm_id_y45m]) > 0 AND SUM([booking_event_arry]) > 0, SUM([booking_event_arry]) / COUNTD([crm_id_y45m]), NULL)

field.title: CRBQ
field.formula: IF(SUM([qual]) > 0 AND SUM([booking_event]) > 0, SUM([booking_event]) / SUM([qual]), NULL)
field.guid_formula: IF(SUM([qual_jotz]) > 0 AND SUM([booking_event_arry]) > 0, SUM([booking_event_arry]) / SUM([qual_jotz]), NULL)

items.title: CRQ
items.formula: IF(COUNTD([crm_id]) > 0 AND SUM([qual]) > 0, SUM([qual]) / COUNTD([crm_id]), NULL)
items.guid_formula: IF(COUNTD([crm_id_y45m]) > 0 AND SUM([qual_jotz]) > 0, SUM([qual_jotz]) / COUNTD([crm_id_y45m]), NULL)

items.title: CRB
items.formula: IF(COUNTD([crm_id]) > 0 AND SUM([booking_event]) > 0, SUM([booking_event]) / COUNTD([crm_id]), NULL)
items.guid_formula: IF(COUNTD([crm_id_y45m]) > 0 AND SUM([booking_event_arry]) > 0, SUM([booking_event_arry]) / COUNTD([crm_id_y45m]), NULL)

items.title: CRBQ
items.guid_formula: IF(SUM([qual_jotz]) > 0 AND SUM([booking_event_arry]) > 0, SUM([booking_event_arry]) / SUM([qual_jotz]), NULL)
items.formula: IF(SUM([qual]) > 0 AND SUM([booking_event]) > 0, SUM([booking_event]) / SUM([qual]), NULL)
